title: Customer List
description: Overview of all customers with search, filtering, and quick access to create new service orders.

elements.intent: Filter the customer table by name, email, or phone number in real time
Open the new customer form to register a new customer in the system
Display all customers with name, email, phone, last order date, and active/inactive status
Indicate whether a customer account is active (has placed orders recently) or inactive
Navigate directly to the new order form pre-scoped to that customer

conversation_history.feedback: Initial wireframe created for customer list screen
conversation_history.changes: Added search bar, customer table with status badge, and new order quick links
